content.en:
"It's here!"

Ye Tian and the Xuantu Controller stopped and came to a dark and silent sea.

Later, the Xuanxu controller also came.

"Black Silent Sea, what are the masters and the Infinite Masters doing here?"

The Xuanxuan Controller was a little puzzled, but it was not easy to ask anything.

He just stood nearby, waiting, and if something special happened, he would pass.

At this time, there were also some eternal masters gathered around, one by one, peering into time and space from far away to check the situation here.

......

"Master of Xuantu, let's start!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Hmm!"

The master of the Xuantu didn't want to waste time, so he sat cross-legged in the black sea and immediately began to operate the black induction technique.

Although he had some expectations and confidence in the Black Induction Technique, after all, his life was at stake, and if he failed this time, he would completely lose hope.

Airplanes!!!

The Black Induction Technique operated, and began to attract several black breaths at the root of the body.

Originally, he couldn't perceive those few black breaths, and he didn't dare to try to find them, but at this moment, under the effect of the Black Induction Technique, he actually sensed the black aura that destroyed the body of control at the root point.

"What a magical black induction technique, it actually allowed me to find the root of the collapse of the body of control, and I sensed these black breaths, this time there is definitely hope!"

The master of Xuantu said excitedly.

......

"Shizun is going to start trying to solve the physical condition, I hope it can succeed this time!"

The Void Controller said expectantly.

But in fact, he didn't think that Ye Tian could help Shizun solve his physical condition, and this time it was very likely to be the same as the previous times.

However, this was the only hope, and he couldn't stop his master from trying.

If you don't try, you can only wait silently for death, and you won't be able to survive for long.

"What is the Master of Xuantu doing? Is he trying to solve the physical condition again?"

"He can't succeed, I asked a Ten Realm-level master, and they all said that the injury of the Xuantu controller can't be solved at all, unless he finds a great being like the Primordial Ancestor to help, there is hope to solve his problem. But how could an existence like a Primordial Ancestor help him?"

"The Xuantu Controller has tried several times before, but they have all failed, and this time the Infinite Controller went to help solve his physical condition, and it is estimated that he will not succeed. "

"After the fall of the master of the Xuantu, how about we divide the treasures he left behind?"

"Okay, no problem, let's divide it equally, there's no need to fight. "

These Eternal Masters all believe that the Xuantu Masters will not be able to recover their physical condition, which is almost a consensus.

However, they didn't expect that Ye Tian would be able to replicate the body of the master of the Xuantu, and they had studied it for many years, created the Black Induction Technique, and personally tested the feasibility of the Black Induction Technique.

Time passed slowly, and under the effect of the Black Channeling Technique, several black breaths were finally drawn out and merged into the Black Silence Sea.

Bang!!!!!

Under the fusion of black aura, the Black Silent Sea began to collapse and die.

In the blink of an eye, the Black Silent Sea that covered this area shattered and died, and this piece of void was also shattered.

And the master of the Xuantu walked out of the dark sea, the rotten aura on his body began to disappear, flesh and blood were derived, and the injuries on the outside returned to normal in the blink of an eye.

However, the Xuantu Masters have not returned to their full glory.

At this moment, he is still not lightly injured, and he also has the sequelae caused by the black induction technique.

In the future, even if all the injuries are recovered, the body of control will be weakened a lot, and the strength will be reduced a lot.

However, he managed to survive.

"Thank you for the Infinite Master's reinvention!"

The master of Xuantu said gratefully.

Although he has not recovered from his injuries yet, he knows that his body under control will no longer collapse, how excited he is!

"Xuantu controller, gratitude is grateful, and the reward still has to be given!" Ye Tian urged.

"Okay, follow me back to Xuantian Sect, all the treasures on my body will be left in Xuantian Sect!"

Xuantu Controller Dao.

After all, he would fall at any time, so he left no treasure on his body.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian tore apart time and space with the master of the Xuantu and returned to the Xuantian Sect.

"Master, ????"

The Void Controller was shocked.

The collapse of the body of control that made countless Eternal Masters helpless was actually handled so quickly by the Infinite Masters.

It's too fast!

Immediately, the Xuanxuan controller was overjoyed.

The master is good, and it means that the backer of Xuantian Sect still exists.

If the master of Xuantu falls, he loses his backer, and it will be difficult to keep the great foundation of Xuantian Sect, unless he takes refuge in a certain big force, but he can't keep a lot of resources.

But now, the master has recovered his body and will not fall, so the Xuantian Sect will be saved.

Xuantian Sect.

The master of the Xuantu took out the three statues of ten thousand phases directly and handed them to Ye Tian: "Infinite master, these are the three statues of ten thousand phases, and there are ten treasures that I promised you at the beginning, I will take out all the treasures immediately, and let you choose." "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian put away the three Ten Thousand Phase Statues and waited for the Xuantu master to take out all the treasures.

Soon.

The master of the Xuantu placed all the treasures in this void one by one, and even some ordinary treasures were also taken out.

Endless treasures occupied this piece of time and space, and it was up to Ye Tian to choose.

"There are really a lot of treasures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, he directly ignored those ordinary treasures, and his eyes roamed back and forth on some top-level treasures.

"The master of the Xuantu actually has a few cursed black stones. "

Ye Tian wouldn't have chosen it.

At the moment, he hadn't figured out the value of the Cursed Blackstone, and there were only a few of them, and it was useless for him to ask for them.

There are still a few treasures on the Xuantu Controller that can improve the primordial-level control body and the Will Transformation Realm, but the Xuantu Controller himself has not mastered the Transformation Realm Will and the primordial-level control body, so he has always stayed on his body, has not used it, and keeps it for future use.

But now, he was afraid that there was no hope.

After all, his foundation is damaged, it would be good to survive, and there is no way to go further in the future.

So, Ye Tian directly took these treasures, and he didn't feel very distressed.

Time passed, and after a long time, Ye Tiancai chose nine treasures, and there was still one thing missing.

"What is this treasure?"

Ye Tian asked, pointing to a black token.

"This is the token of the Primal Ancestor!" the Xuantu master introduced.
